items.title: Fraud and abuse detection
items.description: Tune thresholds so precision stays high enough for analyst capacity while monitoring recall on known fraud rings; report P/R/F1 on time-based holdout sets to catch drift.

items.title: Medical and safety screening
items.description: Optimize recall for life-threatening conditions even at lower precision; document the operating point regulators and clinicians approved.

items.title: Information retrieval and search
items.description: Precision@k and recall@k mirror the same ideas for ranked lists: fraction of retrieved items that are relevant vs fraction of all relevant items retrieved.

items.title: Content moderation and policy classifiers
items.description: Balance false takedowns (precision) against harmful content left live (recall); macro-F1 highlights performance on rare violation types.
